function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read relevant workflow/schema docs, honored explicit-file-list precedence from inbox-processing strategy, and avoided partial mutation when one required file was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction is the authoritative scope and explicitly requires OCR of 5 specific paths. One required path returned file-not-found and could not be resolved after an additional search pass, so completing the task would require guessing/substituting files, which is disallowed. Therefore clarification is required before any edits or inbox deletion.
